perspectives.description: The successful horror novelist who is considering using a recent missing person's case as inspiration for their next book, weighing the potential impact on the victim's family against their creative freedom.

The family of the missing person who is still grieving and has explicitly requested that the media refrain from covering the story, feeling that any exploitation of their tragedy would deepen their pain.

The readers of the novelist's work who may be drawn to the book inspired by the case, potentially unaware of the real-life implications and the family's wishes, and who may have their own emotional responses to the story.
